title: Inference, Annotations, Literals, and Widening · Inference Brief: Inference Context
summary: Model service categories, thresholds, identifiers, and configuration without widening away domain meaning. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts inference context increment in a literal-safe service configuration model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict best-common, contextual, return, and evolving inference from the surrounding expression and use site.
